energy_credit_guidance.preferred_result: Keep the energy-credit sleeve inside portfolio constraints while improving diversification of issuer and subsector exposure.
energy_credit_guidance.committee_bias: Do not increase net high-yield exposure unless the current environment clearly supports the risk.

stale_snapshot_for_reconciliation.comment: An older desk snapshot showed LNG spreads as the only priority and did not include the latest issuer concentration review. Use current office records for the decision file.
